name: DOLLAR GENERAL CORP
business: Dollar General is the largest discount retailer in the United States by number of stores, with 20,959 stores as of February 27, 2026. It sells a broad selection of merchandise including consumables, seasonal items, home products, and apparel, primarily at everyday low prices of $10 or less. Its core customers are low and fixed income households often underserved by other retailers.
sellsTo: value-conscious consumers from a wide income range

exposures.sentence: Our digital tools, including our home delivery offerings, help drive even greater convenience and additional access points.

if our competitors or third parties incorporate artificial intelligence into their businesses more quickly or more successfully than us, it could impair our ability to compete effectively, or if our use of artificial intelligence is inaccurate or ineffective, our competitive position could be adversely affected.

A significant security breach of any kind experienced by us or one of our vendors... could expose us to risks of data loss, litigation, government enforcement actions, fines or penalties, negative publicity and reputational harm, business disruption and costly response measures.

catalysts.event: Plan to open approximately 450 new stores in the U.S. and 10 in Mexico, remodel 2,000 through Project Renovate, 2,250 through Project Elevate, and relocate 20 stores in 2026.
catalysts.sentence: In 2026, we plan to open approximately 450 new stores (as well as approximately 10 stores in Mexico), remodel approximately 2,000 stores through Project Renovate, remodel approximately 2,250 stores through Project Elevate, and relocate approximately 20 stores, for a total of 4,730 real estate projects.
